name: Marcus Fontenot
role: Property owner and informal salvage operator, Deslonde Street, Lower Ninth Ward
publicFace: A quiet, methodical man in his early forties who moves through the flooded house with the deliberate calm of someone who grew up in it and knows every board
privateGoal: To recover the land deed and abstract of title before the city's post-storm machinery can process the fraudulent abandonment filing and clear the lot
fear: That the documents will dissolve before he reaches them — and that even if he recovers them, no one with authority will be in a position to act on them before the redevelopment timeline moves forward
knowledge: The iron document box is pinned under the collapsed plaster ceiling, which is showing active key failure — he has approximately forty minutes before the remaining ceiling section drops

He found a carbon-copy receipt in the box's outer sleeve showing that city assessor's agent Cynthia Tureaud filed the property as abandoned on August 31 — two days before the mandatory shelter-in-place order was lifted
The Fontenot family has held continuous title to this lot since 1923 — the abstract of title inside the box documents an unbroken chain of ownership that predates the city's current survey records
voice: Sparse and factual, with occasional lapses into the specific technical vocabulary of someone who has done physical labor in tight spaces his whole life
trustLogic: Opens up when the other person demonstrates they understand what is actually at stake legally — not emotionally, legally; closes down when treated as a victim rather than an agent
secrets: He has already decided that if the documents are destroyed, he will fabricate a supporting affidavit using his memory of the deed's exact language — he believes this is justified and has not told anyone
He knows Cynthia Tureaud personally; they attended the same church for fifteen years, and her filing the property as abandoned while he was trapped in the flood is a betrayal he has not yet processed

aggressionProfile.mildPressure: Answers questions with minimal information and waits to see what the other person does with it
aggressionProfile.heavyPressure: States the legal facts of the situation with increasing precision, making clear that he has memorized the relevant statutes
aggressionProfile.breakingPoint: Will never disclose his intention to fabricate a supporting affidavit if the originals are destroyed
aggressionProfile.fleeCondition: If the ceiling shows imminent total key failure while he is still inside
aggressionProfile.fleeStyle: Exits through the window frame he entered, taking whatever documents he has recovered
aggressionProfile.capturedBehavior: Cooperates with any authority while immediately requesting to speak to a legal aid representative
